description: Meteosource is a weather data service that provides global forecast, current-condition, historical, air-quality, and map-layer data. Its product is sold in subscription tiers ranging from a free plan to paid plans with higher limits and additional datasets.
summary: Meteosource exposes one authenticated REST weather API covering forecasts/current conditions, air quality, historical time-machine data, location lookup, weather maps, and maritime layers; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI was found.
